questions.question: What is AI?
questions.answer: Artificial Intelligence (AI) refers to the simulation of human intelligence in machines that are programmed to think and learn like humans.

questions.question: What is Machine Learning?
questions.answer: Machine Learning is a subset of AI that enables systems to automatically learn and improve from experience without being explicitly programmed.

questions.question: What is Neural Network?
questions.answer: A Neural Network is a computer system modeled on the human brain and nervous system.

questions.question: What is Deep Learning?
questions.answer: Deep Learning is a subset of machine learning that uses multi-layered neural networks to solve complex problems.

web-links.title: GitHub
web-links.description: Platform for version control and collaboration

text.title: History of AI
text.content: The history of AI began in antiquity, with myths, stories and rumors of artificial beings endowed with intelligence or consciousness by master craftsmen.

text.title: Future of AI
text.content: The future of AI is expected to bring revolutionary changes in healthcare, transportation, education, and many other fields.
